task_description: Comprehensive premium redesign of Deekshi Global Exim website to position it as a professional global export company with Rice as the #1 featured product, luxury navy+gold styling, trust-building certifications, strong CTAs, and content focused on international buyers/importers.

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. All 9 routes generate as static content without errors. Review issues addressed: broken image URL fixed, duplicate images replaced with unique ones, CTA routing differentiated with query params, homepage metadata updated for rice-first SEO. 16 files changed with +714/-289 lines across 5 commits on premium-redesign branch.
